Bearer.name: Authorization
Bearer.description: Enter your Bearer token in the format: Bearer <token>

get.summary: ListFormulas lists formulas with search, filter, and pagination.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search query (searches in code, name, expression).

parameters.name: formulaType
parameters.description:
Filter by formula type.
FORMULA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED (0) means "show all types" (no filter).

 - FORMULA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - FORMULA_TYPE_CALCULATION: Mathematical calculation using parameter codes (e.g., "ELEC_CONSUMPTION * ELEC_RATE").
 - FORMULA_TYPE_SQL_QUERY: SQL query to fetch data from other tables.
 - FORMULA_TYPE_CONSTANT: Constant value (no calculation).

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active status.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: CreateFormulaRequest is the request for creating a new formula.

get.summary: ExportFormulas exports formulas to Excel file.

parameters.name: formulaType
parameters.description:
Filter by formula type.

 - FORMULA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - FORMULA_TYPE_CALCULATION: Mathematical calculation using parameter codes (e.g., "ELEC_CONSUMPTION * ELEC_RATE").
 - FORMULA_TYPE_SQL_QUERY: SQL query to fetch data from other tables.
 - FORMULA_TYPE_CONSTANT: Constant value (no calculation).

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active status.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

post.summary: ImportFormulas imports formulas from Excel file.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ImportFormulasRequest is the request for importing formulas from Excel.

get.summary: DownloadFormulaTemplate downloads the Excel import template.
GetFormula retrieves a formula by ID.

put.summary:
UpdateFormula updates an existing formula.
Note: formula_code is immutable and cannot be changed.

get.summary: ListItemConsStockPO retrieves synced item consumption, stock, and PO data.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search on item name, item code, grade name.

get.summary: ListSyncJobs retrieves a paginated list of sync job executions.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
Filter by status.

 - JOB_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value.
 - JOB_STATUS_QUEUED: Job is queued and waiting for processing.
 - JOB_STATUS_PROCESSING: Job is currently being processed.
 - JOB_STATUS_SUCCESS: Job completed successfully.
 - JOB_STATUS_FAILED: Job failed.
 - JOB_STATUS_CANCELLED: Job was cancelled.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search in job code or error message.

get.summary: GetSyncJob retrieves a specific sync job by ID with execution logs.

post.summary: CancelSyncJob cancels a queued or in-progress sync job.

get.summary: ListSyncPeriods retrieves all available sync periods.

post.summary: TriggerSync initiates a manual Oracle sync job.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: TriggerSyncRequest initiates an Oracle-to-PostgreSQL sync job.

get.summary: ListParameters lists parameters with search, filter, and pagination.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search query (searches in code, name, short_name).

parameters.name: dataType
parameters.description:
Filter by data type.
DATA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED (0) means "show all data types" (no filter).

 - DATA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - DATA_TYPE_NUMBER: Numeric values (integer or decimal).
 - DATA_TYPE_TEXT: Text/string values.
 - DATA_TYPE_BOOLEAN: Boolean (true/false) values.

parameters.name: paramCategory
parameters.description:
Filter by category.
PARAM_CATEGORY_UNSPECIFIED (0) means "show all categories" (no filter).

 - PARAM_CATEGORY_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - PARAM_CATEGORY_INPUT: Input parameter - manually entered values.
 - PARAM_CATEGORY_RATE: Rate parameter - rate/ratio values.
 - PARAM_CATEGORY_CALCULATED: Calculated parameter - computed from other parameters.

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active status.
ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED (0) = show all, ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE (1) = only active,
ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE (2) = only inactive.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: CreateParameterRequest is the request for creating a new parameter.

get.summary: ListRMCosts lists cost rows with filter + pagination.

parameters.name: rmType
parameters.description:
Filter by RM type. UNSPECIFIED = all.

 - RM_COST_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Means "no filter" in list requests.
 - RM_COST_TYPE_GROUP: Cost row aggregates a whole RM group.
 - RM_COST_TYPE_ITEM: Cost row is computed for a single item (future phase).

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
CalculateRMCost runs a calculation synchronously and returns the produced rows.
Intended for admin/troubleshooting use — production traffic should go through
TriggerRMCostCalculation.

get.summary: ListRMCostHistory lists audit-history rows with filter + pagination.
ListRMCostPeriods returns distinct periods from cost rows (newest first).

post.summary: TriggerRMCostCalculation enqueues an async recalculation job.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
TriggerRMCostCalculation enqueues a recalculation job. Returns immediately
with a job ID the caller can poll via the job-execution endpoint.

get.summary: GetRMCost fetches a single cost row by (period, rm_code).
ListRMGroups lists group heads with search + filter + pagination.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search on code, name, description, colourant, ci_name.

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active status.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Create a new RM group head.

get.summary: ExportRMGroups exports all groups + their items to a 2-sheet Excel.

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active/inactive (UNSPECIFIED = all).

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

post.summary:
ImportRMGroups imports groups and/or items from a 2-sheet Excel. Users can
include only the Groups sheet, only the Items sheet, or both.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
ImportRMGroupsRequest accepts a 2-sheet Excel. User may include only the
Groups sheet (header-only import), only the Items sheet (detail-only for
existing groups), or both.

get.summary: DownloadRMGroupTemplate returns a blank 2-sheet Excel with header rows.

ListUngroupedItems reports items from the sync feed that have no active
group assignment.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search on item_code, item_name, item_type_code, grade_code.

get.summary: GetRMGroup retrieves a group head + its details.

delete.summary: DeleteRMGroup soft-deletes a group head (cascade to its details).

put.summary: UpdateRMGroup applies a partial update to a group head.

get.summary:
GetRMGroupItemRates returns per-item per-stage rates for every active
detail of a group in a given period.

post.summary:
AddItems assigns items to a group. Items already in another active group
are returned in `skipped` instead of failing the batch.
RemoveItems removes details from a group (deactivate or soft-delete).

parameters.name: groupHeadId
parameters.description: Owning group head UUID (validated against each detail).

formulaName.description: New display name (optional, 1-200 chars if provided).

inputParamIds.description: New input parameter IDs (optional, replaces all existing).

FormulaServiceUpdateFormulaBody.description:
UpdateFormulaRequest is the request for updating a formula.
Note: formula_code is immutable and cannot be changed after creation.

v1ActiveFilter.description:
ActiveFilter represents filter options for is_active field.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created (ISO 8601).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated (ISO 8601).

updatedBy.description: User who last updated the record.

validationErrors.description: List of validation errors if any.

isSuccess.description: Indicates if the operation was successful.

v1BaseResponse.description: BaseResponse is the standard response wrapper for all API responses.

formulaCode.description: Unique code (uppercase, alphanumeric with underscore, 1-50 chars).

inputParamIds.description: Input parameter IDs (at least 1 for CALCULATION type).

v1CreateFormulaRequest.description: CreateFormulaRequest is the request for creating a new formula.

v1CreateFormulaResponse.description: CreateFormulaResponse is the response for creating a formula.

v1DeleteFormulaResponse.description: DeleteFormulaResponse is the response for deleting a formula.

fileContent.description: Excel template file content as bytes (.xlsx format).

v1DownloadFormulaTemplateResponse.description: DownloadFormulaTemplateResponse is the response containing the template file.

fileContent.description: Excel file content as bytes (.xlsx format).

v1ExportFormulasResponse.description: ExportFormulasResponse is the response containing the Excel file.

expression.description: Expression text (e.g., "ELEC_CONSUMPTION * ELEC_RATE" or SQL query).

resultParamId.description: Result/output parameter ID (UUID FK to mst_parameter).

resultParamCode.description: Resolved result parameter code (read-only, from join).

resultParamName.description: Resolved result parameter name (read-only, from join).

v1Formula.description: Formula represents a master formula entity for costing calculations.

sortOrder.description: Display order of the parameter in the formula.

v1FormulaParam.description: FormulaParam represents an input parameter reference within a formula.

v1FormulaType.description:
FormulaType represents the type of a formula expression.

 - FORMULA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - FORMULA_TYPE_CALCULATION: Mathematical calculation using parameter codes (e.g., "ELEC_CONSUMPTION * ELEC_RATE").
 - FORMULA_TYPE_SQL_QUERY: SQL query to fetch data from other tables.
 - FORMULA_TYPE_CONSTANT: Constant value (no calculation).

v1GetFormulaResponse.description: GetFormulaResponse is the response for getting a formula.

rowNumber.description: Row number in the Excel file.

v1ImportError.description: ImportError represents a single import error.

fileContent.description: Excel file content as bytes (.xlsx or .xls format).

v1ImportFormulasRequest.description: ImportFormulasRequest is the request for importing formulas from Excel.

skippedCount.description: Number of skipped records (duplicates with skip action).

updatedCount.description: Number of updated records (duplicates with update action).

v1ImportFormulasResponse.description: ImportFormulasResponse is the response for importing formulas.

v1ListFormulasResponse.description: ListFormulasResponse is the response for listing formulas.

totalItems.description: Total number of items across all pages.

v1PaginationResponse.description: PaginationResponse contains pagination metadata for list responses.

v1UpdateFormulaResponse.description: UpdateFormulaResponse is the response for updating a formula.

field.description: The field name that failed validation.

v1ValidationError.description: ValidationError represents a single field validation error.

OracleSyncServiceCancelSyncJobBody.description: CancelSyncJobRequest cancels a queued or processing sync job.

v1GetSyncJobResponse.description: GetSyncJobResponse returns a single sync job with logs.

syncedAt.description: Timestamp when the record was synced (ISO 8601).

syncedByJob.description: Job ID that synced this record (UUID).

v1ItemConsStockPO.description: ItemConsStockPO represents a synced item consumption, stock, and PO record.

v1JobLogStatus.description:
JobLogStatus represents the status of a job execution log step.

 - JOB_LOG_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value.
 - JOB_LOG_STATUS_STARTED: Step has started.
 - JOB_LOG_STATUS_SUCCESS: Step completed successfully.
 - JOB_LOG_STATUS_FAILED: Step failed.
 - JOB_LOG_STATUS_SKIPPED: Step was skipped.

v1JobStatus.description:
JobStatus represents the current state of a job execution.

 - JOB_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value.
 - JOB_STATUS_QUEUED: Job is queued and waiting for processing.
 - JOB_STATUS_PROCESSING: Job is currently being processed.
 - JOB_STATUS_SUCCESS: Job completed successfully.
 - JOB_STATUS_FAILED: Job failed.
 - JOB_STATUS_CANCELLED: Job was cancelled.

v1ListItemConsStockPOResponse.description: ListItemConsStockPOResponse returns synced item consumption data.

v1ListSyncJobsResponse.description: ListSyncJobsResponse returns a paginated list of sync jobs.

periods.description: List of periods in YYYYMM format, ordered descending.

v1ListSyncPeriodsResponse.description: ListSyncPeriodsResponse returns the list of distinct periods.

errorMessage.description: Error message if the job failed.

queuedAt.description: Timestamp when the job was queued (ISO 8601).

cancelledAt.description: Timestamp when the job was cancelled (ISO 8601).

v1SyncJob.description: SyncJob represents a job execution for Oracle-to-PostgreSQL sync.

durationMs.description: Duration of the step in milliseconds.

v1SyncJobLog.description: SyncJobLog represents a single step log entry within a job execution.

period.description: Period to sync (YYYYMM format). If empty, auto-resolved based on current date.

v1TriggerSyncRequest.description: TriggerSyncRequest initiates an Oracle-to-PostgreSQL sync job.

paramName.description: New display name (optional, 1-200 chars if provided).

dataType.description: New data type (optional, cannot be UNSPECIFIED if provided).

paramCategory.description: New category (optional, cannot be UNSPECIFIED if provided).

uomId.description: New UOM reference (optional, UUID format, empty string to clear).

ParameterServiceUpdateParameterBody.description:
UpdateParameterRequest is the request for updating a parameter.
Note: param_code is immutable and cannot be changed after creation.

paramCode.description:
Unique code (uppercase, alphanumeric with underscore, 1-20 chars).
Must start with an uppercase letter. Immutable after creation.

uomId.description: Optional UOM reference (UUID format, empty string means no UOM).

v1CreateParameterRequest.description: CreateParameterRequest is the request for creating a new parameter.

v1CreateParameterResponse.description: CreateParameterResponse is the response for creating a parameter.

v1DataType.description:
DataType represents the data type of a parameter value.

 - DATA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - DATA_TYPE_NUMBER: Numeric values (integer or decimal).
 - DATA_TYPE_TEXT: Text/string values.
 - DATA_TYPE_BOOLEAN: Boolean (true/false) values.

v1DeleteParameterResponse.description: DeleteParameterResponse is the response for deleting a parameter.

fileContent.description: Excel template file content as bytes (.xlsx format).

v1DownloadParameterTemplateResponse.description: DownloadParameterTemplateResponse is the response containing the template file.

fileContent.description: Excel file content as bytes (.xlsx format).

v1ExportParametersResponse.description: ExportParametersResponse is the response containing the Excel file.

v1GetParameterResponse.description: GetParameterResponse is the response for getting a parameter.

fileContent.description: Excel file content as bytes (.xlsx or .xls format).

v1ImportParametersRequest.description: ImportParametersRequest is the request for importing parameters from Excel.

skippedCount.description: Number of skipped records (duplicates with skip action).

updatedCount.description: Number of updated records (duplicates with update action).

v1ImportParametersResponse.description: ImportParametersResponse is the response for importing parameters.

v1ListParametersResponse.description: ListParametersResponse is the response for listing parameters.

v1ParamCategory.description:
ParamCategory represents the category/purpose of a parameter.

 - PARAM_CATEGORY_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - PARAM_CATEGORY_INPUT: Input parameter - manually entered values.
 - PARAM_CATEGORY_RATE: Rate parameter - rate/ratio values.
 - PARAM_CATEGORY_CALCULATED: Calculated parameter - computed from other parameters.

dataType.description: Data type of the parameter value.

defaultValue.description: Default value (decimal, as string for precision).

minValue.description: Minimum allowed value (decimal, as string for precision).

maxValue.description: Maximum allowed value (decimal, as string for precision).

uomCode.description: Resolved UOM code (read-only, populated from mst_uom join).

uomName.description: Resolved UOM name (read-only, populated from mst_uom join).

v1Parameter.description: Parameter represents a master parameter entity for costing calculations.

v1UpdateParameterResponse.description: UpdateParameterResponse is the response for updating a parameter.

categoryName.description: New display name (optional, 1-100 chars if provided).

RMCategoryServiceUpdateRMCategoryBody.description:
UpdateRMCategoryRequest is the request for updating a raw material category.
Note: category_code is immutable and cannot be changed after creation.

categoryCode.description:
Unique code (uppercase, alphanumeric with underscore, 1-20 chars).
Must start with an uppercase letter. Immutable after creation.

v1CreateRMCategoryRequest.description: CreateRMCategoryRequest is the request for creating a new raw material category.

v1CreateRMCategoryResponse.description: CreateRMCategoryResponse is the response for creating a raw material category.

v1DeleteRMCategoryResponse.description: DeleteRMCategoryResponse is the response for deleting a raw material category.

fileContent.description: Excel template file content as bytes (.xlsx format).

v1DownloadRMCategoryTemplateResponse.description: DownloadRMCategoryTemplateResponse is the response containing the template file.

fileContent.description: Excel file content as bytes (.xlsx format).

v1ExportRMCategoriesResponse.description: ExportRMCategoriesResponse is the response containing the Excel file.

v1GetRMCategoryResponse.description: GetRMCategoryResponse is the response for getting a raw material category.

fileContent.description: Excel file content as bytes (.xlsx or .xls format).

fileName.description:
Original filename (for format detection).
Must be a simple filename without path separators.

v1ImportRMCategoriesRequest.description: ImportRMCategoriesRequest is the request for importing raw material categories from Excel.

skippedCount.description: Number of skipped records (duplicates with skip action).

updatedCount.description: Number of updated records (duplicates with update action).

v1ImportRMCategoriesResponse.description: ImportRMCategoriesResponse is the response for importing raw material categories.

v1ListRMCategoriesResponse.description: ListRMCategoriesResponse is the response for listing raw material categories.

v1RMCategory.description:
RMCategory represents a Raw Material Category entity.
Used to classify raw materials (e.g., Chips, Oil, Dyes, Chemicals).

v1UpdateRMCategoryResponse.description: UpdateRMCategoryResponse is the response for updating a raw material category.

v1CalculateRMCostRequest.description:
CalculateRMCost runs a calculation synchronously and returns the produced rows.
Intended for admin/troubleshooting use — production traffic should go through
TriggerRMCostCalculation.

skipped.description: Number of group heads skipped (no active details / no source rows).

data.description: History rows ordered by calculated_at DESC.

periods.description: Distinct periods ordered DESC (newest first), YYYYMM strings.

v1ListRMCostPeriodsResponse.description: Response carries the distinct set of calculated periods.

groupHeadId.description: Owning group head UUID (set when rm_type=GROUP).

rmName.description: Display name of the RM (group or item).

costValuation.description: Computed valuation landed cost (nil when never calculated).

flagValuation.description: Flags configured on the group header at calc time.

flagMarketing.description: Flag configured on the group header at calc time.

flagSimulation.description: Flag configured on the group header at calc time.

flagValuationUsed.description: Stage actually used after cascade / INIT resolution.

flagMarketingUsed.description: Stage actually used after cascade / INIT resolution.

flagSimulationUsed.description: Stage actually used after cascade / INIT resolution.

calculatedAt.description: Last calculation timestamp (RFC3339, empty when never calculated).

v1RMCost.description: RMCost is the landed cost computed for a single (period, rm_code) pair.

rmCostId.description: Cost row this history refers to (nil if the cost row was later deleted).

jobId.description: Job that produced this history row (nil when no job context).

rates.description: Rates captured for this calc pass.

costPercentage.description: Snapshot of head.cost_percentage at calc time.

costPerKg.description: Snapshot of head.cost_per_kg at calc time.

v1RMCostHistory.description:
RMCostHistory is one row of the append-only audit trail written alongside every
calculation pass.

v1RMCostRates.description: RMCostRates is the per-stage snapshot of aggregated rates captured at calc time.

v1RMCostTriggerReason.description:
RMCostTriggerReason enumerates the reasons a calculation was run. Mirrors
`rmcost.HistoryTriggerReason`.

 - RM_COST_TRIGGER_REASON_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Rejected on trigger requests via not_in: [0].
 - RM_COST_TRIGGER_REASON_ORACLE_SYNC_CHAIN: Auto-chained after a successful Oracle sync for the synced period.
 - RM_COST_TRIGGER_REASON_GROUP_UPDATE: Group header changed.
 - RM_COST_TRIGGER_REASON_DETAIL_CHANGE: An item was added/removed/toggled in the group.
 - RM_COST_TRIGGER_REASON_MANUAL_UI: Explicit user request from the UI.

v1RMCostType.description:
RMCostType discriminates a group-level cost row from an item-level cost row.

 - RM_COST_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Means "no filter" in list requests.
 - RM_COST_TYPE_GROUP: Cost row aggregates a whole RM group.
 - RM_COST_TYPE_ITEM: Cost row is computed for a single item (future phase).

v1RMGroupFlag.description:
RMGroupFlag identifies which aggregated stage rate feeds a cost purpose
(valuation / marketing / simulation), or whether the group uses its
configured init override value. Mirrors the `cst_rm_group_head.flag_*`
domain constraint.

 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Rejected on create/update requests via not_in: [0].
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_INIT: Use the init_val_* override on the head; skips cascade.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_CONS: Use the CONS stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_STORES: Use the STORES stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_DEPT: Use the DEPT stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_PO_1: Use the first PO stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_PO_2: Use the second PO stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_PO_3: Use the third PO stage rate.

groupHeadId.description: When set, scope the calc to a single group. Empty = all active groups.

v1TriggerRMCostCalculationRequest.description:
TriggerRMCostCalculation enqueues a recalculation job. Returns immediately
with a job ID the caller can poll via the job-execution endpoint.

RMGroupServiceAddItemsBody.description:
Add one or more items to a group. Items already in another active group are
returned in `skipped` rather than erroring the whole batch.

RMGroupServiceRemoveItemsBody.description:
Remove items from a group by detail IDs. The mode controls whether the rows
are deactivated (preserved for history) or soft-deleted.

clearInitValValuation.description: When true, force init_val_valuation to NULL (overrides init_val_valuation field).

clearInitValMarketing.description: When true, force init_val_marketing to NULL.

clearInitValSimulation.description: When true, force init_val_simulation to NULL.

RMGroupServiceUpdateRMGroupBody.description:
Partial update of an RM group head. Absent fields leave state unchanged.
Clear_* booleans explicitly set nullable fields to NULL.

skipped.description: Items that were skipped because they already belong to another active group.

groupCode.description: Group code (uppercase; spaces + hyphens allowed; 1-30 chars).

v1CreateRMGroupRequest.description: Create a new RM group head.

v1ExportRMGroupsResponse.description: ExportRMGroupsResponse returns a multi-sheet Excel (Groups + Items).

data.description: Per-item rates, one row per active detail.

duplicateAction.description:
How to handle existing groups by `group_code`: "skip" (default) or "update".
Detail rows always additive: items already active in ANOTHER group are
reported as skipped errors; items already in the target group are ignored.

v1ImportRMGroupsRequest.description:
ImportRMGroupsRequest accepts a 2-sheet Excel. User may include only the
Groups sheet (header-only import), only the Items sheet (detail-only for
existing groups), or both.

groupsSkipped.description: Number of group heads skipped (duplicate_action=skip + existed).

itemsAdded.description: Number of detail items successfully added.

itemsSkipped.description: Number of detail items skipped (already in target group).

failedCount.description: Number of failed rows (across both sheets).

data.description: Ungrouped items for the requested filters.

marketValueRp.description: Per-item marketing value in rupiah (nil when unset).

isActive.description: Contributes to rate aggregation when true.

isDummy.description: Placeholder row (excluded from aggregation regardless of is_active).

v1RMGroupDetail.description: RMGroupDetail is one item's membership in an RM group.

groupCode.description: Unique group code (uppercase; allows spaces + hyphens; 1-30 chars).

costPercentage.description: Cost percentage multiplier (raw, UI formats for display).

costPerKg.description: Per-kg overhead added to landed cost.

flagValuation.description: Stage flag used for valuation cost.

flagMarketing.description: Stage flag used for marketing cost.

flagSimulation.description: Stage flag used for simulation cost.

initValValuation.description: Init-value override for valuation (set when flag_valuation = INIT).

initValMarketing.description: Init-value override for marketing (set when flag_marketing = INIT).

initValSimulation.description: Init-value override for simulation (set when flag_simulation = INIT).

v1RMGroupHead.description: RMGroupHead is the aggregate root representing an RM group's cost configuration.

v1RMGroupHeadWithDetails.description: RMGroupHeadWithDetails bundles a head and its details for the Get response.

isDummy.description: Whether the detail is a dummy row.

period.description: Period the rates apply to (YYYYMM), empty when no sync row was found.

v1RMGroupItemRates.description:
RMGroupItemRates is one row per item currently in a group with its per-stage
Oracle sync rates for a given period. Items with no sync row for the period
still appear (all rates 0).

v1RemoveItemsMode.description:
RemoveItemsMode controls how RemoveItems disposes of detail rows.

 - REMOVE_ITEMS_MODE_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Rejected via not_in: [0].
 - REMOVE_ITEMS_MODE_DEACTIVATE: Mark the details inactive but keep the rows for audit history.
 - REMOVE_ITEMS_MODE_SOFT_DELETE: Soft-delete the details (sets deleted_at/deleted_by).

v1SkippedItem.description:
SkippedItem captures items rejected by AddItems because they already belong
to another active group.

v1UngroupedItem.description:
UngroupedItem is a raw material present in the Oracle sync feed that has no
active RM group assignment.

uomName.description:
New display name (optional, 1-100 chars if provided).
Empty string means no change.

UOMServiceUpdateUOMBody.description:
UpdateUOMRequest is the request for updating a UOM.
Note: uom_code is immutable and cannot be changed after creation.

uomCode.description:
Unique code (uppercase, alphanumeric with underscore, 1-20 chars).
Must start with an uppercase letter. Immutable after creation.

uomCategoryId.description: Category ID (UUID, required - FK to mst_uom_category).

v1CreateUOMRequest.description: CreateUOMRequest is the request for creating a new UOM.

v1CreateUOMResponse.description: CreateUOMResponse is the response for creating a UOM.

v1DeleteUOMResponse.description: DeleteUOMResponse is the response for deleting a UOM.

fileContent.description: Excel template file content as bytes (.xlsx format).

v1DownloadTemplateResponse.description: DownloadTemplateResponse is the response containing the template file.

fileContent.description: Excel file content as bytes (.xlsx format).

v1ExportUOMsResponse.description: ExportUOMsResponse is the response containing the Excel file.

v1GetUOMResponse.description: GetUOMResponse is the response for getting a UOM.

fileContent.description: Excel file content as bytes (.xlsx or .xls format).

fileName.description:
Original filename (for format detection).
Must be a simple filename without path separators.

v1ImportUOMsRequest.description: ImportUOMsRequest is the request for importing UOMs from Excel.

skippedCount.description: Number of skipped records (duplicates with skip action).

updatedCount.description: Number of updated records (duplicates with update action).

v1ImportUOMsResponse.description: ImportUOMsResponse is the response for importing UOMs.

v1ListUOMsResponse.description: ListUOMsResponse is the response for listing UOMs.

v1UOM.description: UOM represents a Unit of Measure entity.

v1UpdateUOMResponse.description: UpdateUOMResponse is the response for updating a UOM.

categoryName.description: New display name (optional, 1-100 chars if provided).

UOMCategoryServiceUpdateUOMCategoryBody.description:
UpdateUOMCategoryRequest is the request for updating a UOM category.
Note: category_code is immutable and cannot be changed after creation.

categoryCode.description:
Unique code (uppercase, alphanumeric with underscore, 1-20 chars).
Must start with an uppercase letter. Immutable after creation.

v1CreateUOMCategoryRequest.description: CreateUOMCategoryRequest is the request for creating a new UOM category.

v1CreateUOMCategoryResponse.description: CreateUOMCategoryResponse is the response for creating a UOM category.

v1DeleteUOMCategoryResponse.description: DeleteUOMCategoryResponse is the response for deleting a UOM category.

fileContent.description: Excel template file content as bytes (.xlsx format).

v1DownloadUOMCategoryTemplateResponse.description: DownloadUOMCategoryTemplateResponse is the response containing the template file.

fileContent.description: Excel file content as bytes (.xlsx format).

v1ExportUOMCategoriesResponse.description: ExportUOMCategoriesResponse is the response containing the Excel file.

v1GetUOMCategoryResponse.description: GetUOMCategoryResponse is the response for getting a UOM category.

fileContent.description: Excel file content as bytes (.xlsx or .xls format).

fileName.description:
Original filename (for format detection).
Must be a simple filename without path separators.

v1ImportUOMCategoriesRequest.description: ImportUOMCategoriesRequest is the request for importing UOM categories from Excel.

skippedCount.description: Number of skipped records (duplicates with skip action).

updatedCount.description: Number of updated records (duplicates with update action).

v1ImportUOMCategoriesResponse.description: ImportUOMCategoriesResponse is the response for importing UOM categories.

v1ListUOMCategoriesResponse.description: ListUOMCategoriesResponse is the response for listing UOM categories.

v1UOMCategory.description:
UOMCategory represents a Unit of Measure Category entity.
Used to classify UOMs (e.g., Weight, Length, Volume, Quantity, Time, Energy).

v1UpdateUOMCategoryResponse.description: UpdateUOMCategoryResponse is the response for updating a UOM category.
